title: stelis genychila
intro: Stelis genychila, also known as the "Panama Orchid", is a type of epiphytic orchid species native to Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stelis genychila include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Stelis genychila can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are often used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and other health issues.
